title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN 73rd NEC PLENARY-AH THUSAWI
content:
828/2026-2027

Aizawl the 4th June 2026:Vawiin khan Meghalaya State Convention Centre, Shillong-ah NEC Plenary vawi 73-na Union Home Minister Pu Amit Shah, Chairman, NEC ni bawk hovin neih a ni a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan Ministry of DoNER hnuaia Convener a nihna High Level Task Force on Northeast Economic Corridor (NEEC) Final Report bu chu Pu Amit Shah hnenah hian a thehlut a, thusawina hun a hmang bawk.

Chief Minister chuan, Prime Minister-in India hmarchhak bialte tana a hmathlir Act East hi a tha hle a, nakin lawka India ram hmasawnna thlentu bulpui ni thei khawpin hmarchhak bial hi a awmna a remchang a, natural resource-ah te, mipuiah te, culture lamte thlengin theihna a nei a ni, a ti.

Chief Minister thusawi langsar dangte chu:

1. Connectivity hi kan zaa mamawh thlir a “One-Grid Approach” hmanga kalpui a tha a. Kawngpui, Railway, Air link, Waterway, Power, Telecom leh logistics te hi inkungkaih takin hmasawntir theih a tha.

2. Kaladan Multi-Modal Transit Transport Project hi a puitling hnai a, kawng hrang hranga kan inbuatsaih a ngai a. DoNER Ministry hian investment-readiness, trade-readiness, skill development, entrepreneurship promotion, border infrastructure leh logistics hub, community confidence-building programme-ah te hma min lakpui (support) se a tha hle.

3. Investment hi project hrang hrang kalpui thluah lovin, kan zaa mamawh thlirin a hlawm emaw a inzawmin (cluster) kalpui ila thain kan hria. Investment kalpui nana tha; Mau, Agri-Horti Value Chain, Food Processing, Textile, Eco-tourism, Green energy leh digital service-ah chutiang chuan kal ila kan zain kan chhawr tlang hle ang.

4. Tourism hi North East pumpui circuit pakhat anga common branding leh facilitation neia hmasawntir a tha berin a rinawm.

5. Trade leh logistics hi an pawimawh dan a inang reng a. Act East Policy leh India–Myanmar–Thailand Trilateral Highway hmangin North East chu logistics leh trade gateway atan siam theih a ni.

6. North East tana ruahman 10% Gross Budgetary Support (GBS) hi a hming maia kalpui lovin, tha takin kalpui thei ila. DoNER emaw NEC hnuaiah Coordination Mechanism siam ni se.

7. Kan thalaite hi kan resource pawimawh ber an ni a. Chuvangin, skill development, incubation, tourism & hospitality, logistics, agri-business, green technology leh start-up ecosystem lamah nasa zawka chher an ngai.

8. DoNER hnuaia project approval a lo chak zawk nan state tinah Project Implementation Unit din ni thei se, tih te an ni.

Pu Lalduhoma hian Mizoram chu “Ginger Capital of India” a puan a nih avang leh Mizoram Ginger USP Project a vangin lawmthu a sawi a. Thenzawl Peace City ruahman mek chu tourism, education, health, sports leh agro-based development hmunpui ni chho thei tur a nih avanga tihhlawhtlin ngei a tul thu a tarlang.

HLTF on NEEC Report a thehluh chungchang sawiin, he ruahmanna anga hmalak a nih chuan, India hmarchhak state-te inkalpawhna te, tourism te, investment te, trade and logistic te hi tum thuhmun nei takin a kal dawn a, kan hlawkpui vek dawn a ni, a ti.

73rd Plenary hi Pu Amit Shah hian a kaihruai a, DoNER Minister Pu Jyotiraditya Scindia, Minister of State for DoNER Dr. Sukanta Majumdar te leh hmarchhak state Chief Minister te leh official pawimawh tak takte an tel a ni.

title: Hnahthial District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day 2026 thukhawm
content:
827/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 4thJune, 2026:Vawiin chawhma khan DC Meeting Hall, Hnahthial-ah Hnahthial District Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day 2026 chu an Chairman District Bawrhsap ni bawk Pi K. Vanlalruati kaihhruaiin an thukhawm a. He hunah hian June ni 11-a Green Mizoram Day hman dan tur chungchangte, thing tiak sem dan turte, Fire Prevention Award sem dan tur leh thil pawimawh hrang hrang ngaihtuah ho a ni.

Meeting kaihruaitu, District Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan kumin State Level Committee on Green Mizoram Day thupui - "Thing hi rangkachak anga hlu, Nunna tinreng bul a ni" (Trees are as precious as gold, They are the foundation of all life) chu tha a tih thu sawiin rilru a hre reng turin member-te a chah a. Kuminah a tam thei ang ber thing tiak phun tur leh a puitlin theih nan uluk taka enkawl chhunzawm zel a tul tur turin a chah bawk.

Member Secretary leh DFO Lunglei Division ni bawk, Pu Lalduhthlana chuan kum hmasa lama Green Mizoram Day hmannaa thingphun dinhmun tlangpui powerpoint presentation hmangin a tarlang a. Kum kalta lama an thingphun tam tak nung zo lo te chu a chhan ni thei awmte sawi ho in, hmalak zel dan tur sawi ho nghal a ni.

Committee hian kumin Green Mizoram 2026-a thingtiak phunna atan Hnahthial Bypass Road chu thlangin Inauguration Function chu Johana Pa Filling Station remchang laiah neih nise tiin a rel a, khuallian atan District Bawrhsap chu nise ti a rel a ni bawk. Thingphun zawh hnuah kum kalta lama mahni thingphunte enkawl zui leh ni se ti a rel niin kum danga an lo tih thin angin Fire Prevention Award chu Independence Day-ah sem leh tura ruahman a ni.

Meeting ah hian Hnahthial khaw chhunga NGO hrang hrang aiawhte leh Department hrang hrang aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: ECI Deputy Director-in Reiek tlawhin, SIR 2026-a an hmalakna a enpui
content:
826/2026-2027

4th June, 2026 :Mizorama cham mek Election Commission of India (ECI) Deputy Director Pu Apurva Kumar Singh, IIS, chuan vawiin khan Reiek a tlawh.

ECI Deputy Director hi Reiek BDO, Assistant Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) ni bawk Pi Betty Lalrinfeli leh a thawhpuiten an lo dawngsawng a, Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Rolls hlawhtlinna tura an hmalak tawh dan hrang hrang te a lo sawipui a ni.

Hemi hnu hian AERO Office ah BLO-te nen an hmalak tawhna te an sawi ho a, an hmalakna leh hlawhtlinna hrang hrang te mipui hriata pholang uar hle turin ECI Deputy Director chuan a chah a ni. BLO te hnathawh dan te leh SIR 2026 a hlawhtlin theihna tura an vahchuahna hrang hrang thlalak leh video te lakhawm a, dah tha thin turin a chah a. An khawtlanga mi chhuanawm te chhawr tangkai a, an khawtlang hruaitute nen thawhhona tha tak nei tura chahin Pu Apurva Kumar Singh chuan India khua leh tui kum tling chin tumah hmaih nei loa Electoral Roll-a an chuan vek theih nan, thahnemngai taka thawk turin a ngen a ni.

Zawhna leh chhanna hun te an hman zawh hnuah Pu Apurva Kumar Singh leh amah tawiawmtuten Reiek khawchhunga in engemawzat an tlawh a. BLO ten House to House visit an neih dan a enpui nghal a ni.

Attachment
